speaker: MALCOLM
text: Now near enough. Your leafy screens throw down

speaker: MALCOLM
text: And show like those you are.—You, worthy uncle,

speaker: MALCOLM
text: Shall with my cousin, your right noble son,

speaker: MALCOLM
text: Lead our first battle. Worthy Macduff and we

speaker: MALCOLM
text: Shall take upon ’s what else remains to do,

speaker: SIWARD
text: Do we but find the tyrant’s power tonight,

speaker: SIWARD
text: Let us be beaten if we cannot fight.

speaker: MACDUFF
text: Make all our trumpets speak; give them all breath,

speaker: MACDUFF
text: Those clamorous harbingers of blood and death.
